mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_alert_config (monitor_type, threshold, duration, alert_level, notify_method, notify_target, is_enabled) VALUES (#{monitorType}, #{threshold}, #{duration}, #{alertLevel}, #{notifyMethod}, #{notifyTarget}, #{isEnabled})

INSERT INTO monitor_alert_history (config_id, monitor_type, alert_level, alert_value, threshold, message, status) VALUES (#{configId}, #{monitorType}, #{alertLevel}, #{alertValue}, #{threshold}, #{message}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monitor_alert_history WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monitor_alert_history WHERE status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_record (monitor_type, metric_name, metric_value, unit, extra_data, recorded_at) VALUES (#{monitorType}, #{metricName}, #{metricValue}, #{unit}, #{extraData}, #{recordedAt})

INSERT INTO monitor_record (monitor_type, metric_name, metric_value, unit, extra_data, recorded_at) VALUES
(#{item.monitorType}, #{item.metricName}, #{item.metricValue}, #{item.unit}, #{item.extraData}, #{item.recordedAt})
